title: Cyrtochilum carderi
taxonomy: Cyrtochilum carderi is a species of orchid in the genus Cyrtochilum. Cyrtochilum carderi is classified within the family Orchidaceae. Cyrtochilum carderi is further classified in the subfamily Orchidoideae. Cyrtochilum carderi belongs to the tribe Maximilarieae. Cyrtochilum carderi is native to South America.
